finding_results.evidence: Della's confrontation lines now hinge on concrete hunger and profit stakes at chapters/chapter_11.md:87 and chapters/chapter_11.md:137; Lucille's map read now hinges on proof, tract status, and lawful standing at chapters/chapter_11.md:177.
finding_results.notes: Replaced the repeated abstract curate/curated diction. Della now speaks through food, bodies, and material benefit under pressure, while Lucille frames the same discovery through record defects, evidentiary limits, and legal interpretation.
finding_results.summary: Voice separation is restored in the cited dialogue beats, with Della grounded in lived material consequence and Lucille grounded in paper and procedure.
